source_intake_record.raw_question_text: An oscillator circuit using ideal op-amp and diodes is shown in the <image>. The time duration for the positive part of the cycle is \( \Delta t_1 \) and for the negative part is \( \Delta t_2 \). The value of \( e^{\frac{\Delta t_1 - \Delta t_2}{RC}} \) will be ______.
extraction_notes: answer field is option letter only; mapped B to choice text
image field contains a PIL.Image object representation, not a path or URL

image_dependency: question_text explicitly says the oscillator circuit is 'shown in the figure'
the needed circuit topology and diode/op-amp connections are not described textually
multi_step: the problem asks about two separate time intervals, Δt1 and Δt2, for positive and negative cycle parts
solving likely requires extracting circuit behavior from the figure and then combining the results into exp((Δt1-Δt2)/RC)
the target is not a direct lookup; it suggests at least circuit-analysis plus algebraic simplification
verifiability: multiple-choice options are provided and include 0.8
the requested expression is mathematically well-defined, so a derived result can be checked against the numeric answer

decision_reasons: Question, answer, and required primary image are all present, so the core semantics are available.
Asset registry passed with no recorded issues.
Although the problem is highly image-dependent, the needed figure exists and is accessible.
High verifiability score and a specific numeric answer support reliable downstream use.
